{{Quote|They'll soon be dust!|General Tal Ashen|audio=Talsoondust.flac|<ref name="GBCC" />}}
'''Tal Ashen''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
{{Quote|You pathetic Rebel scum. You'll never take the Imperial Palace. A legion of the Empire's best troops awaits you!|General Tal Ashen|<ref name="GBCC" />}}
[[File:AshenATAT.jpg|thumb|left|200px|General Ashen defending the Imperial Palace on his [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] together with [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark troopers]].]]
[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] hand-picked [[General/Legends|General]] Ashen to command the [[Coruscant Defense Forces]] and the [[Elite Force]] defending the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]].<ref name="GBCC" />

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="TEA" /> when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] launched its [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|assault]] to capture [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], General Ashen's ability to defend the Palace was challenged. Despite several [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]], a legion of the Emperor's finest troops, a squad of [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guards]], advanced [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] support and a series of defensive positions, Ashen was defeated by the New Republic forces led by Generals [[Rand Talor]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. During the battle, Ashen's All Terrain Armored Transport was brought to the ground. Somehow, he climbed out ready to fight on the ground, but was soon killed on the street.<ref name="GBCC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ashen's portrait in the game interface is actually a photograph of [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]].<ref name="GBCC" /><ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
